about.title: About Enamel clinic
about.subtitle: Dedicated to the health and beauty of your smile
about.intro: Enamel is a modern dental clinic in the heart of Sarajevo, founded to deliver premium dental care in a comfortable and safe environment.
about.missionText: We believe everyone deserves a healthy, confident smile. We combine cutting-edge technology with a careful, individual approach to every patient.
